notes: Boat-access only tropical retreat on La Gomera. YOAS Yoga Retreats. Sound healing, chakra work in afternoon sessions. Perfect for RAV Vast meditation. Remote paradise setting.
Yoga and wellness retreat on Tenerife's south coast. Regular yoga retreats with sound healing sessions. Mediterranean-style villa with ocean views.
Wellness retreat center near south Tenerife. Hosts yoga retreats, meditation workshops, sound healing events. Beautiful garden setting with mountain views.
Yoga center in Corralejo. Offers yoga retreats with live music integration. Surf and yoga packages. Ocean views, perfect sunset location.
Yoga and surf retreat in Famara, Lanzarote. Sound healing workshops, meditation sessions. Desert landscape meets ocean. Volcanic island energy.
Annual handpan festival in Fuerteventura. PERFECT for RAV Vast endorsed artist. Workshops, concerts, jam sessions. Community gathering for steel drum enthusiasts.
Legendary sunset sessions every Sunday all summer. Direct beachfront setting. 10 AM breakfast bar transforms to vibrant club after sunset. Perfect for organic house transitions. Live DJ sets.
Attracts world-class international DJs. Open-air venue with stunning sea views. Famous legendary Sunday sunset sessions throughout summer. Live performers welcome.
Super chill vibe overlooking Atlantic Ocean. Beautiful sunset views. Heated infinity pool. Live DJs year-round. Private VIP cabins ideal for hybrid acts.
Iconic beach club with direct sea access and Balinese beds. Famous for popular weekend parties. Perfect sunset positioning on long sandy beach. DJ sets.
One of liveliest beachfront spots in Corralejo. Open 9 PM - 6 AM. Excellent for extended sunset-into-night organic house sessions. Live entertainment and DJ sets.
DJ floor for dancing with tables for relaxation. Prime beach location in Morro Jable. Perfect for hybrid acts combining lounge areas with DJ dance floor. Electronic/house music.
Modern design with two spacious rooms directly across from Corralejo Beach. Renowned for talented DJ hosts. Quality sound systems for evening performances.

city: Gran Canaria - San Bartolome de Tirajana
notes: Luxury beach club with sunbeds, daybeds, Balinese loungers. Privileged sunset views over Bay of Arguineguin. Year-round operation. DJ and lounge music.
One of best parties in south Gran Canaria. Regularly organizes live music and DJ events. Upscale Meloneras area with sophisticated clientele. House music.
Luxury exclusive ambiance with champagne bar. Perfect chill-out vibe for sunset sessions. Year-round perfect climate. Private cabanas ideal for hybrid performances.
Low-key early evening chilled club beats perfect for organic house. Located in Melia Salinas hotel grounds. Transitions to live music guests as night falls.
Luxurious jazz club setting perfect for hybrid organic house + live music acts. Sophisticated clientele appreciates nuanced, live instrumentation. Thursday-Saturday live performances.
German-run wellness retreat focused on fasting, yoga, and holistic health. Sound healing sessions complement their wellness programs. Ocean cliff location. Hosts regular yoga and meditation retreats.
Countryside yoga retreat with volcanic landscape views. Regular yoga teacher trainings and retreats. Sound healing and meditation sessions. Organic gardens.
Wellness retreat in Lajares village. Yoga, surfing, and conscious events. Sound healing ceremonies. Desert landscape. Artist residencies possible.
Eco-retreat with geodesic domes and yurts. Hosts conscious events, yoga retreats, sound healing ceremonies. Community gatherings. Sustainable living focus.
5-star luxury resort with extensive wellness facilities. Live music events, sunset sessions at Beach Club. High-end clientele. Private events. Golf and spa.
Ultra-luxury resort with world-class spa. Private wellness experiences, sunset terrace events. Perfect for high-end sound healing sessions. Exclusive clientele.
Iconic 5-star resort with extensive wellness spa. Hosts live music events, sunset sessions at beach clubs. Multiple venues within resort. High-end corporate and private events.
Boutique hotel with beautiful gardens. Sunset terrace with ocean views. Live music during dinner service. Intimate events setting. Wellness focus.
Retreat center on La Palma island. Star-gazing wellness retreats (La Palma is UNESCO Starlight Reserve). Sound healing under the stars. Remote, pristine nature.
Retreat organizer on La Palma. Yoga, hiking, sound healing retreats. Works with local venues. UNESCO biosphere reserve setting. Dark sky retreats.
Cultural foundation in Cesar Manrique's former home. Hosts cultural events, concerts in volcanic bubble caves. Unique acoustic setting. Artistic, conscious events.
Cesar Manrique-designed cactus garden. Hosts sunset concerts and cultural events. Unique volcanic amphitheater setting. Atmospheric evening performances.
